name: sccfs
description: St. Clare College Filing System – local-first desktop filing application for registrar operations

scripts.build:renderer: esbuild src/renderer/index.tsx --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --outfile=dist/renderer/renderer/index.js --sourcemap && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='src/renderer/index.html'; const dest='dist/renderer/renderer/index.html'; fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dest), { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync(src, dest);"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
